_comment: Manual save-the-date entries. Use this file to add upcoming earnings dates for Tier 1 companies whose wire (BusinessWire) we can't scrape yet. Format matches confirmed_dates.json; will be merged in by build_earnings_dashboard.py. Set source_type='manual' so the dashboard knows.
